And the Science of Predictive Astrology treats of the follow-
ing topics: The Signs of the Zodiac, Hora (equal to 15°), decanate
(equal to 10°), Navarhsa (1/9 of a Sign or 3°—20'), Dvadasamsa
1/12 of a Sign or 2°—30'), Trimlamsa (30° degrees assigned to the
five non-luminous planets), determination of strength and weakness
of planets on the basis of these parts or Vargas, ascertaining the
multifarious strength of planets due to their direction, position,
time and motion, the humours, constituent elements of the body,
substances, castes, functions and the like, represented by or

u Brhat Samhitt
allotted to the planets as well as the Signs, the time of impregna-
tion and actual birth, forecasting wonderful and freak births,
immediate death, total span of life contributed by the planets, the
